metadata.description: Provider-agnostic co-pilot for OpenProblems spatial transcriptomics: domain skills and an MCP validation server.

plugins.name: openproblems-spatial
plugins.description: Spatial transcriptomics skills (data validation, Viash component authoring, Nextflow debugging, OpenProblems submission) plus an MCP server that validates SpatialData/zarr/AnnData and analyzes Viash/Nextflow configs. Skills auto-discover from skills/; the MCP server is declared in .mcp.json.
